overview: Vidyamandir is a bilingual (English & Bengali) e-commerce bookshop for a local store in Purba Bardhaman, West Bengal. It features a full Flipkart/Amazon-style shopping experience with AI chat support, PWA installation for Android/iOS/Windows, and comprehensive admin tools.
features: Bilingual catalog (English & Bengali) with search and filters
AI-powered chatbox that answers book/order questions and sends replies to user email and phone
PWA installation for Android, iOS, and Windows
Admin panel with analytics, inventory, orders, promo codes, returns & refunds
Email and SMS notifications for key actions
PDF invoice downloads for customers and admins
